name: agent-bench
description: Run the same Claude Code task across multiple config variants and compare results

scripts.format: prettier --write lib/ bin/ test/ '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check lib/ bin/ test/ '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check
